auth.title: Qadha Tracker
auth.subtitle: Track your qadha journey
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a magic link to sign in.
auth.privacy: By continuing, you agree to our privacy policy.

prayerCard.selectOrDrag: Select a single day or drag to pick a range.

fastingCard.label: Fasting
fastingCard.whenFast: When did you fast this qadha?

remaining.allLogged: All prayers already logged for this day.

fullDay.title: Log full day — all 5 prayers
fullDay.desc: Logs 1 qadha for Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha for each selected day.

adjust.title: Adjust remaining qadha
adjust.desc: Change the count directly. The difference is recorded as an adjustment in your history.
adjust.addToAllDesc: Adds this count to each of the 5 prayers.

history.title: History
history.deleteDescription: Remaining count adjusts accordingly. Cannot be undone.

data.title: Data & Privacy
data.intro1: We store your prayer and fasting counts, phase configuration, and basic profile. Nothing else.
data.intro2: We never ask why a prayer or fast was missed. No notes. No tracking. That is between you and Allah.
data.intro3: Your data is encrypted at rest. Only you can read it.
data.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes your account and all data — prayers, fasts, profile. This cannot be undone.

about.title: About
about.p1: We store the count of prayers and fasts you owe, the dates you logged actions, and your basic profile. Nothing else.
about.p2: We do not ask why a prayer or fast was missed. We do not store notes. We do not track patterns. That is between you and Allah.
about.p3: Your data is encrypted at rest and only you can read it. You can export it or delete your account at any time from Settings → Data.
about.disclaimer: Not a fiqh authority. Consult your own scholar for rulings.

baligh.title: Age of Religious Responsibility
baligh.subtitle: When did you reach baligh (puberty)?
baligh.firstPeriodAge: Age at first period (optional — overrides year)
baligh.unknownNote: Using age 15 — the default most scholars apply when uncertain.

prayers.title: Missed Prayers
prayers.subtitle: Choose how you want to enter your missed prayers.
prayers.phasesDesc: Break your life into periods (e.g. school, university, work) and estimate how consistently you prayed in each.
prayers.quickDesc: Don't remember specific years? Enter a rough total directly.
prayers.exactOption: I know the exact count per prayer
prayers.howMany: How many {{unit}} of prayers did you miss?

fasting.title: Fasting Phases
fasting.subtitle: How many Ramadan days did you miss per year?
fasting.daysToMakeUp: days of fasting to make up

menstruation.title: Menstruation Details
menstruation.subtitle: Used to calculate prayer and fasting qadha accurately.
menstruation.note1: Menstruation days are <1>excluded</1> from prayer qadha — you are exempt.
menstruation.note2: Menstruation days during Ramadan are <1>included</1> in fasting qadha — these must be made up.

review.title: Review
review.subtitle: Here's your qadha debt.
review.adjustLater: You can adjust these later in Settings.
review.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
